help: ARIA role should be appropriate for the element

sample.html: <a class="ht-tile" role="listitem" href="/plants/giant-coneflower/" aria-label="Big Sky Sunset Coneflower, flowering, view plant" style="--i:0">
sample.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  ARIA role listitem is not allowed for given element

help: Links must be distinguishable without relying on color

sample.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  The link has insufficient color contrast of 1.19:1 with the surrounding text. (Minimum contrast is 3:1, link text: #6fcf8e, surrounding text: #a1b09b)
  The link has no styling (such as underline) to distinguish it from the surrounding text

help: Certain ARIA roles must contain particular children

sample.html: <div class="hero-tiles" role="list" aria-label="A few plants from the library">
sample.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has children which are not allowed: a[aria-label]

help: Scrollable region must have keyboard access

sample.html: <ul class="fs-pop" id="f-month-listbox" role="listbox" tabindex="-1" aria-label="Filter by bloom month" aria-activedescendant="f-month-opt-0">
sample.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element should have focusable content
  Element should be focusable

help: Elements must meet minimum color contrast ratio thresholds

sample.failureSummary:
Fix any of the following:
  Element has insufficient color contrast of 4.45 (foreground color: #2f7a45, background color: #e9eee2, font size: 11.4pt (15.2px), font weight: normal). Expected contrast ratio of 4.5:1
